title: AI Sales Start to Justify Data-Center Spending Boom, Report Says
summary: Revenue from artificial intelligence has reached a tipping point, showing that the hundreds of billions of dollars tech companies are spending on it may be economically sustainable, according to a report from research firm Exponential View.
